title: Better Furnace
description: BetterFurnace introduces seven new types of furnaces with varying cooking speeds, wihout Resource Pack ! They're getting harder and harder to get and fit perfectly with your minecraft survival.
body:
# BetterFurnace - Datapack - Minecraft 1.21
![better_furnace](https://github.com/Hardel-DW/BetterFurnace/assets/42413417/05922563-9464-4497-9d7c-59adbcf76b9e)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# What is BetterFurnace?
BetterFurnace introduces seven new types of furnaces with varying cooking speeds, without Resource Pack! They're getting harder and harder to obtain and fit perfectly with your Minecraft survival.

| Furnace | Cooking Speed |
| --- | --- |
| **Iron** | 4 seconds |
| **Copper** | 3 seconds |
| **Golden** | 2 seconds |
| **Diamond** | 1 second |
| **Emerald** | 0.5 seconds |
| **Netherite** | 4 items/sec |
| **Extreme** | 20 items/sec |

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

![Furnace Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25617fb18160ce742c52466b8a7981970b925f6d.webp)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

For detailed information about **BetterFurnace** recipes and all other Voxel creations, please refer to the documentation.

With more support, I can make tools for creators, players, and modders. I plan to create the **Hytale asset editor in Minecraft!**
